sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96165" key="staqero/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στᾰθερ-ότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n96165.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">steadiness, firmness</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:515" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">515</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σταθηρότης</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
